oracles.title: NullReferenceException in StoveController.FinishCooking
oracles.trigger_condition: Complete cooking on stove (cookDuration elapses after TryStartCooking succeeds)
oracles.actual_behavior: NullReferenceException — no AudioSource component is attached to Stove_Main

oracles.title: Stove starts cooking without bowl on hob
oracles.trigger_condition: Activate stove without placing Bowl_Mixing on MixingBowlSocket hob
oracles.expected_behavior: Cooking should only start when hobSocket.HasBowl is true
oracles.actual_behavior: Cooking timer starts even with no bowl present

oracles.title: Power toggle-off does not reset RecipeController.PowerEnabled
oracles.expected_behavior: PowerEnabled should return to false when switch turns off
oracles.actual_behavior: PowerEnabled stays true — downstream gates remain open permanently

oracles.title: Sink wash timer not reset — instant wash on retry
oracles.trigger_condition: Place ingredient → remove before wash done → place again
oracles.expected_behavior: _washTimer should reset to 0 on each placement
oracles.actual_behavior: Accumulated time carries over; wash completes immediately on re-place

oracles.title: Cabinet slides in wrong direction (sign error)
oracles.trigger_condition: Open Cabinet_Ingredients after unlocking pantry door
oracles.expected_behavior: Cabinet slides outward (negative Z local offset)
oracles.actual_behavior: Cabinet slides into wall (positive Z — sign error in openLocalPosition)

oracles.title: ServingPlateSocket accepts uncooked dish
oracles.expected_behavior: Socket should reject dish if RecipeController.DishCooked is false
oracles.actual_behavior: DishCooked guard is commented out — plating always succeeds

oracles.title: RecipeController allows power without opening pantry
oracles.trigger_condition: Pick up Key_Pantry → toggle power without inserting key into lock
oracles.actual_behavior: Gate checks hasPantryKey — picking up key is sufficient to skip pantry-open step

oracles.title: Badge panel stays red after successful kitchen unlock
oracles.trigger_condition: Scan badge without power (panel goes red) → enable power → scan badge again (succeeds but panel stays red)
oracles.expected_behavior: Panel material updates to materialUnlocked on success path
oracles.actual_behavior: Success path does not call panelRenderer.sharedMaterial = materialUnlocked

oracles.title: CuttingBoard calls SetIngredientCut(false) before validation
oracles.trigger_condition: Interact with Board_Cutting when Tool_Knife NOT in knife slot
oracles.expected_behavior: SetIngredientCut should only be called after all validation passes
oracles.actual_behavior: SetIngredientCut(false) called immediately — RecipeController emits spurious FAIL warning

oracles.title: ResetAllState does not reset downstream controller flags
oracles.expected_behavior: All downstream controllers (StoveController, SinkWashStation, etc.) should also reset
oracles.actual_behavior: Only RecipeController flags are reset — downstream _isUnlocked/_hasWashed/CurrentState are stale

state_oracles.label: recipe_monotonic
state_oracles.description: Recipe flags must be set in strict order 1-10
